titleStmt.title: SII 8.367: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 367. (A.R. No. 87 of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhi
rājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvaruṁ rājadhāni kalyāṇada nelevīḍi
noḷu sukhasaṁkatā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyuttamire samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
ṁ mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara nahitamaṁḍaḷikama¨rddana mahēśvara nijakuḷakuvaḷayasudhākaraṁ vinaya
guṇaratnākaraṁ sumaṁḍaḷikavaleyakke rēvaṁtta nilīnavacādhyādattanoppugaṇḍusuttiṁbaḷasu
maṇḍayanadēva maṟevugekāva viṣamaturagādhyāsa brāhma ttanahitakritāntaṁ śrī
manmallikā¨rjjunadēvalabdhavaraprasāda maḷayabhīḷa [kālacu¨ryya]nacaḷitadhai¨ryyaṁ śrīmatri
bhuvanamalladēva pēṣaṇagaruḍa nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
jōyimayyarasar deṁdūṟeyi¨rccāsiramumaṁ nāḷdu rājadhāni piriyamōsaṁgiya nelebī
ḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkatāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara jōyimayya
rasara pādapadmōpajīvigaḷappa daṇḍanāyakaṁ bācaṇanuṁ cavuṇḍanāyakanuṁ caṁḍeyanāyakanuṁ cāḷekya
vikrama va¨rṣa[¨r]dane śukulasaṁvatsarada māgha suddha 2 Ādivāra muttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyaṁdu śrīmūlastāna svayaṁbu
deva¨rggeṁ śrīrāmēśvaradēva¨rggeṁ snānagandhadhūpadīpanivēdyā¨rccanakkamāgi kōṭeya dakṣiṇadiśāvarada miṟutūra [Āve]yallikereya
dāriyallu sa¨rbbābhyantarasiddhiyāge biṭṭa kariyakeyi mattaru 50 caṁḍēśvaradēva¨rgge mattaru 20
dēva¨rggemattaṁ dēva¨rgge tōṁṭa moṁdu gāṇa meraḍu nivēṣaṇa 1 kōṭeyoḷagāgi
paḷḷigapale Iṁtumaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ jōyimayyarasaru yamani
yamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇa japasamādhisaṁpannarappa śrīmatukāḷāmukha tapōdha
naru mallikā¨rjjuna paṁḍita¨rgge dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍikoṭṭa datti . sāmānyōyaṁ dha¨rmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kā
lē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ . sa¨rvvānētānbhāginaḥ pā¨rthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhūyōyācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
priyadiṁ dintidaneydekāvapuriṣaṁgāyuṣya maṁ śrīyumakkeyi(minti)daṁ kāyanikā
yva pāpi(ṁ)ge kurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷuvāraṇā . siyoḷēḷkōṭe munīṁdraraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ
koṁdo sailākṣarabrājigaḷ . śrīśrī dēvaragaḍi ba 42
cittāripallōjaṁge mattaru 12 Ī dha¨rmmakāvanānuvapāyamaṁ ciṁttisidavana vaṁśakṣayamakkuṁ
hanmaṁtēsvaradēva¨rgge mattaru 13
caṁdra bhusaṇajīya¨rggeThe last two lines are damaged.
Digital edition of SII 8.367 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
